_model_note: Main session = ORCHESTRATOR / regime-architect on Opus 4.8 — it drives the sequence, scores the framework selection matrix, picks the ONE primary framework, and authors the Stage A spec documents. Subagents override via their own model: frontmatter. Reasoning-heavy nodes (causal-auditor, prediction-researcher) run on Opus 4.8 (+xhigh / +high); the rest on Sonnet. Pin exact IDs for reproducibility: claude-opus-4-8, claude-sonnet-4-6.
_effort_note: Main session (orchestrator) runs at xhigh — Opus 4.8 supports it (max/ultracode are session-only and cannot go here; xhigh can). Subagents set their own effort in frontmatter and override this default: framework-scout medium, data-agent/completeness-auditor high, causal-auditor xhigh, prediction-researcher high.
_view_note: 멀티 서브에이전트 dispatch이지만 --dangerously-skip-permissions가 dispatched bg session으로 전파되는 P0 위험을 피하려고 Agent View를 끈다. 정책상 필요하면 해제.
_plugins_note: claude-mem은 PostToolUse matcher '*'로 모든 도구 호출마다 프로세스를 띄운다. 다회 fan-out 연구에서는 끈다(전역·타 프로젝트 영향 없음). perf-audit 2026-06-05 항목 2.
